data.title: Current US president to be first to have his signature featured on US currency.
data.description: The current president is set to become the first in-office president to have his signature on the American currency.

data.title: Regulatory Expert Files Citizen Petition Urging FDA to Address 13-Year Delay in Conflict-of-Interest Policy
data.description: A regulatory science expert and adjunct professor at the University of Illinois Chicago, Sarfaraz K. Niazi, Ph.D., reported today the submission of a formal Citizen Petition to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration under 21 CFR §10.30. The petition calls for certain actions and adjustments in the FDA regulations.

data.description: The latest data analysis from Milabo emphasizes the scalable insights that are bolstering Leifras' education philosophy. LEIFRAS Co., Ltd. data.title: Faraday Future Completes Delivery of Additional EAI Robots to New PBB Auto Inc., and Showcases Its Robotics to Students in Los Angeles Through an Innovative Hands-on Interactive Demonstration Event
data.description: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (Nasdaq: FFAI) revealed the delivery of its Master robot and the pilot delivery of the Aegis robot to New PBB Auto Inc. The California-based EAI company sealed a binding FX B2B deposit agreement with New PBB Auto last year. data.description: SAXX recently announced the addition of professional hockey player Max Domi to their team of elite athletes. This update was released on 26-Mar-2026 by SAXX via PR Newswire. The corrected news release includes further information about the change.
